name: ripple
description: 라이브 변경 영향 분석 — VS Code 익스텐션 + AI 백엔드 두뇌 (any-to-any)

scripts.demo: concurrently -n brain,app -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w sample-app"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w extension
scripts.package: npm run build -w extension && cd extension && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies -o ripple.vsix
